top.title: US launches new strikes on Iran, targeting missile sites and boats
top.summary: US Central Command says the strikes were taken in "self-defense". It comes as senior Iranian negotiators arrive in Qatar for talks to end the war.

top.title: Deal with US not imminent, Iran says
top.summary: The US secretary of state earlier said that an agreement could possibly come on Monday.

top.title: Oil prices slide on hopes of US-Iran peace deal
top.summary: Trump said on Saturday that an agreement would include the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, without giving further details.

top.title: Social media as bad for young people as smoking, top doctors say
top.summary: The Academy of Medical Royal Colleges says doctors should routinely check on screen time and social media use when seeing younger patients.

top.title: The rise of the fruit that tastes like custard
top.summary: Custard apple plants are prized for their hardiness but exporting their delicate fruit is difficult.

top.title: AI may speed up search for drugs to treat brain conditions
top.summary: Researchers hope the work will help identify affordable, effective drugs to treat conditions like MND.

title.#text: Sennheiser’s new Momentum 5 headphones have upgraded ANC and a replaceable battery
Ferrari reveals its first EV, with design help from Jony Ive
Cox Media fined after bragging it spied on users through their phones
